mapper.insert: INSERT INTO point_history (user_id, amount, reason, attendance_log_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{amount}, #{reason}, #{attendanceLogId})

INSERT INTO user_wallet (user_id, balance, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{amount}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON CONFLICT (user_id) -- userid가 이미 존재하면? DO UPDATE SET -- 기존 데이터를 수정해라 balance = user_wallet.balance + EXCLUDED.balance, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
